summary: Frontend testing completed for Pass-e-port travel app. All requested features working correctly: Visa page has comprehensive map coverage (193 countries), Seasons page category filter tabs (All, Beach, Mountain, City, Culture, Adventure, Nature) working, Country Detail Modal opens with Cost Estimator button accessible, Cost Estimator modal functions properly with form inputs and cost calculation.

issues: Page sometimes shows blank when directly navigating to /seasons URL - works fine from root / or via navigation menu

passed_tests: Visa page loads with 193 country cards (expanded from 132)
Visa legend shows all 5 types: Visa Free (green), Visa on Arrival (red), E-Visa (blue), Visa Required (orange), No Data (grey)
Visa map shows comprehensive world coverage with minimal grey areas
Seasons page (root /) loads with all category filter tabs visible
Category tabs present: All Destinations, Beach (22), Mountain (5), City (27), Culture (33), Adventure (21), Nature (26)
Beach filter applied - shows 'Filtered by: Beach' indicator
Filter changes country card count based on category
Country card click opens Country Detail Modal
Country Detail Modal shows country flag, name, country code
Modal footer contains 'Add to Wishlist' and 'Cost Estimator' buttons
Cost Estimator button opens Trip Cost Estimator modal
Cost Estimator form has: Destination dropdown, Duration, Travelers, Budget Type (Budget/Mid-Range/Luxury)
Cost calculation works - shows total cost, per person per day breakdown
Cost breakdown shows: Flights, Accommodation, Food & Dining, Activities & Tours, Local Transport, Shopping & Miscellaneous
Money Saving Tips section displayed in results
action_items: MINOR: Consider adding /seasons route to App.js to fix direct URL navigation issue (currently Seasons page is only on root /)
critical_code_review_comments: React console shows duplicate key warnings for country codes (ARE, JPN, SGP, etc.) - should use unique keys in map components
App.js has /seasons route missing - Seasons page only available at root / which may cause confusion
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: Visa page has 193 countries (expanded coverage), Seasons page has 7 category filter tabs with counts, Country Detail Modal has Cost Estimator integration. Backend returns 199 countries for seasons API. Cost Estimator is frontend-only with hardcoded cost data for 24 countries. Note: Direct navigation to /seasons may show blank page - use root / or menu navigation.
mocked_apis_note: Cost Estimator uses hardcoded country cost data in CostEstimator.js (not an API). FOREX rates fallback to sample data when API unavailable.
